sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67936" key="micono/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιξο-νόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67936.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feeding promiscuously</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔριφος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">172</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
